category: DINO Sport Men - age bracket 11-18 (the full Sport class, not the easier Junior category)
confidence_note: Based on official DINO result fields. Paul has only ONE verified 2026 race (Winona Lake), so rivals are provisional until he races more rounds. Upcoming registration lists and his NICA category could not be accessed (both gated).
garmin_flag: His Garmin shows rides at Potato Creek (Jun 21) and Muscatatuck (Jul 12) on race days, but he is not in the Sport Men results those days. He likely pre-rode the course or raced a different category - worth confirming which races he is actually entering.

chase.name: Brooks Graves
chase.detail: Nearest junior ahead at Winona (8th, +4:40). The key age-group target.

chase.name: Eric Zimmerman
chase.detail: 13th at Winona (+1:56) and races most rounds - a recurring benchmark to measure against.

chase.name: Kerry Beber
chase.detail: The literal next wheel at Winona (16th, +0:56). Realistic to hold onto.

peers.name: William Hoffman
peers.detail: 14, Indianapolis. Finished just behind Paul at Winona (+2:25) and races every round - a reliable close training/racing peer.

peers.name: Owen Hoffman
peers.detail: 14, Indianapolis. Hoffman brothers race every DINO round together - steady regular partners.

peers.name: Harrison Lapish
peers.detail: 16-17, Indianapolis. Races nearly every round at a similar-to-slightly-slower pace - a good recurring measuring stick.

aspirational.name: Wyatt Romine
aspirational.detail: 15, Warsaw. WON Winona Sport Men outright (1:36:33). Elite - a long-term target.

upcoming: Registration entry lists for Southwestway Park (Aug 16, DINO) and the Stoney Run NICA opener (Aug 29-30) are not public - both are behind logins. Check the start lists the week of each race.
nica: Indiana NICA races by grade + ability: Middle School -> Freshman -> Sophomore -> JV -> Varsity, with mid-season upgrades for top finishers. At 16 with his Sport-level speed, Paul is likely a Sophomore or upgraded JV rider - but his exact NICA category could not be verified (the NICA results site was blocked).
